title: Calibrated Explanations for Decision-Critical Foundation Models
authors: Aarya Mehta, Lin Chen, Sofia Alvarez
abstract: A framework for measuring whether model explanations remain calibrated when decisions carry material consequences.

title: Auditing Multimodal Models Under Distribution Shift
abstract: A systematic audit protocol for multimodal systems deployed beyond their original training environments.

title: Participatory Benchmarks for Public-Sector AI
authors: Maya Rao, Aarya Mehta, Elias Stein
abstract: Methods for building evaluation benchmarks with communities affected by public-sector automated decisions.

title: Uncertainty-Aware Forecasting for Regional Energy Grids
abstract: Probabilistic energy forecasting that communicates operational uncertainty to regional grid operators.

title: Data Statements for Climate Intelligence
authors: Aarya Mehta, Priya Nair, Ellen Wu
abstract: Documentation practices for the geographic, temporal, and institutional limits of climate datasets.

title: Fair Resource Allocation with Causal Representation Learning
abstract: Causal representations for equitable allocation when historical outcomes encode structural disadvantage.
